title: The Crew Encounters Strange Enemies
description: On pages 12–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the crew encounters strange enemies.
scene: The scene focuses on the crew encounters strange enemies, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you look around, it's fairly obvious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Franky!! We've been locked up, frankly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uh, you're not exactly human yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And neither are you!! Oh, forget it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well... it sure wasn't one of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And these seem to be eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It really turned into a face!!

summary: The Crew Encounters Strange Enemies. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
